name: AgencyZoom Insurance Agency Automation REST API
what_it_does: AgencyZoom insurance agency automation REST API for independent insurance agencies, agents, and producers to manage client relationships, policy renewals, sales pipeline, agency onboarding, cross-sell opportunities, and agency performance analytics — enabling automated insurance client management, renewal notifications, cross-sell campaign management, and agency production reporting through AgencyZoom's insurance-specific CRM and agency automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage client for insurance policyholder relationship and contact automation, handle policy renewal for expiration tracking and renewal campaign automation, access sales pipeline for insurance producer opportunity tracking automation, retrieve agency onboarding for new producer setup and training automation, manage cross-sell for insurance product cross-sell opportunity automation, handle policy for active policy tracking and coverage management automation, access carrier for insurance carrier relationship and appointment automation, retrieve performance for agency production and goal tracking automation, manage task for agent activity and follow-up automation, and integrate AgencyZoom with AMS (Applied Epic, Hawksoft), Salesforce, and carrier systems for insurance agency operations automation.
use_cases: Automating policy renewal outreach and expiration tracking for insurance retention automation agents
Managing insurance sales pipeline and cross-sell opportunities for agency growth automation agents
Tracking agency production and producer performance for agency management automation agents
Onboarding new insurance producers with automated training and task assignment automation agents
not_for: Commercial insurance underwriting (AgencyZoom is agency CRM, not underwriting platform)
Claims management (AgencyZoom is sales and retention focused, not claims processing)
Carrier systems (AgencyZoom integrates with carriers but is not itself a carrier system)
best_when: An independent insurance agency, insurance brokerage, or insurance organization wanting AI agents to automate client management, policy renewal campaigns, cross-sell tracking, and producer performance monitoring through AgencyZoom's insurance-specific automation platform.
avoid_when: INSURANCE AGENCY ACCOUNT REQUIRED: AgencyZoom is for insurance agencies; automated individual consumer access assumption creates agency_required; automated must be or represent a licensed insurance agency. AMS INTEGRATION IS EXPECTED: AgencyZoom is designed to integrate with Agency Management Systems (Applied Epic, Hawksoft, QQ Catalyst); automated standalone CRM assumption creates missing_policy_data without AMS connection; automated must connect AgencyZoom to existing AMS for complete policy data. STATE LICENSING AFFECTS FEATURES: Insurance agency features vary by licensed state; automated uniform feature assumption creates state_license_required for state-specific insurance products; automated must verify agency's licensed states before enabling products. DATA SYNC WITH AMS IS PERIODIC: AgencyZoom syncs with AMS on scheduled intervals; automated real-time policy data assumption creates delayed_policy_status from AMS sync lag; automated must account for AMS sync schedule.

auth.notes: AgencyZoom uses API key + OAuth2 for agency REST API. REST API with JSON. Beaverton, OR HQ. Founded 2016. Products: CRM (client/prospect management), Policy Renewal Automation, Agency Onboarding, Cross-sell Campaigns, Agency Analytics. Backed by Goosehead Insurance ecosystem. Competes with HawkSoft CRM, NowCerts, and QQ Catalyst CRM for independent insurance agency automation. 5,000+ agency users.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo and trial via sales; production requires AgencyZoom subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription per agency; user-based pricing; integration add-ons; onboarding services
pricing.notes: Beaverton OR. Insurance agency CRM. Monthly subscription. 5,000+ agency users. P&C insurance focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; client and policy APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: POLICY DATA COMES FROM AMS: AgencyZoom policy data depends on AMS integration; automated direct policy-entry assumption creates data_not_available without AMS sync; automated must configure AMS connection before expecting complete policy data in AgencyZoom

RENEWAL CAMPAIGN TIMING IS CONFIGURABLE: AgencyZoom renewal campaigns trigger based on configurable date offsets (60/30/10 days before expiry); automated fixed renewal timing assumption creates misconfigured_renewal_timing; automated must configure renewal workflow triggers per agency practice

PRODUCER LICENSING MUST BE VERIFIED: Insurance producers must have active state licenses; automated unlicensed producer assumption creates compliance_risk for insurance activities by unlicensed agents; automated must verify producer license status before assignment

CARRIER APPETITE VARIES: Cross-sell recommendations in AgencyZoom must align with appointed carriers; automated universal carrier assumption creates carrier_not_appointed for products without agency appointment; automated must filter cross-sell by agency carrier appointments

ACTIVITY LOGGING IS COMPLIANCE-RELEVANT: Insurance agency activity logs may have E&O (errors and omissions) compliance implications; automated minimal logging assumption creates missing_activity_record for client interactions that should be documented; automated must log all client touchpoints in AgencyZoom
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance agency. SOC2. API key. US. Insurance client and policy relationship data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance CRM. SOC2. API key. US. Insurance client, policy, and producer data.
